description: Detects Arc<Mutex<T>> and Arc<RwLock<T>> patterns that may indicate over-synchronization in Rust. Simplified from Rust: matches all generic type usages via scoped Mutex::new / RwLock::new constructor calls. Cannot detect Arc<Mutex<bool>> vs Arc<Mutex<T>> distinction for severity graduation.

flag.message: Mutex/RwLock constructor detected -- consider if a concurrent data structure or message passing would be simpler
